---
title: "Mucin gel assembly is controlled by a collective action of non-mucin proteins, disulfide bridges, Ca2+-mediated links, and hydrogen bonding"
author: ["Oliver W. Meldrum", "Gleb E. Yakubov", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Omkar Deshmukh", "Michael A. McGuckin", "Michael J. Gidley"]
date: 2018-04-11
publication: "Scientific Reports, **8**, 5802 (2018)."
categories: ["Rheology"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-018-24223-3
url_preprint:
journ: "Scientific Reports"
issue: 8
page: 5802
year: 2018
image: featured.png
pub_number: 2
---
